languages.original_text: "Esteemed Genetor, I have the highest respect for your craft, but I absolutely refuse to allow experimental rejuvenat procedures to be performed on myself. Be so kind as to find yourself another victim."

languages.text: "Почтенный генетор, я высоко оцениваю ваше ремесло, но категорически отказываюсь проводить на себе экспериментальные ювенильные процедуры. Сделайте милость, найдите себе другую жертву".

"Esteemed Genetor, I have the highest respect for your craft, but I absolutely refuse to allow experimental rejuvenat procedures to be performed on myself. Be so kind as to find yourself another victim."

languages.text: «Estimado genetor, respeto profundamente sus talentos, pero me niego en redondo a permitir que me realice procedimientos de rejuvenecimiento. Tenga la bondad de buscarse otra víctima».
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Genetor, I have the highest respect for your craft, but I absolutely refuse to allow experimental rejuvenat procedures to be performed on myself. Be so kind as to find yourself another victim."

languages.text: 「高名なるゲネター、あなたの技には最大限の敬意を抱いておりますが、私自身に実験的な若返り処置を施すことは、断固としてお断りいたします。どうか、別の犠牲者をお探しくださいますよう」
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Genetor, I have the highest respect for your craft, but I absolutely refuse to allow experimental rejuvenat procedures to be performed on myself. Be so kind as to find yourself another victim."

traits.locale_text: 「高名なるゲネター、あなたの技には最大限の敬意を抱いておりますが、私自身に実験的な若返り処置を施すことは、断固としてお断りいたします。どうか、別の犠牲者をお探しくださいますよう」

languages.text: “尊敬的基因士，我对你的技艺怀有至高的敬意，但我绝对拒绝在自己身上进行实验性返老还童手术。请你另寻他人吧。”
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Genetor, I have the highest respect for your craft, but I absolutely refuse to allow experimental rejuvenat procedures to be performed on myself. Be so kind as to find yourself another victim."

traits.locale_text: “尊敬的基因士，我对你的技艺怀有至高的敬意，但我绝对拒绝在自己身上进行实验性返老还童手术。请你另寻他人吧。”

languages.text: "Geschätzter Genetor, ich habe allergrößten Respekt vor Eurer Kunst, verweigere allerdings mit Nachdruck jegliche experimentelle Verjüngungsprozeduren an mir selbst. Also seid so nett und sucht Euch ein anderes Opfer."
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Genetor, I have the highest respect for your craft, but I absolutely refuse to allow experimental rejuvenat procedures to be performed on myself. Be so kind as to find yourself another victim."

traits.locale_text: "Geschätzter Genetor, ich habe allergrößten Respekt vor Eurer Kunst, verweigere allerdings mit Nachdruck jegliche experimentelle Verjüngungsprozeduren an mir selbst. Also seid so nett und sucht Euch ein anderes Opfer."

languages.text: « Honorable genetor, j'ai le plus grand respect pour votre art, cependant, je m'oppose fermement à toute procédure expérimentale de rajeunissement sur ma personne. Veuillez vous trouver une autre victime. »
languages.original_text: "Esteemed Genetor, I have the highest respect for your craft, but I absolutely refuse to allow experimental rejuvenat procedures to be performed on myself. Be so kind as to find yourself another victim."

languages.text: "Saygıdeğer Genetör, zanaatınıza büyük saygı duymakla birlikte kendi üzerimde deneysel gençleştirme prosedürleri uygulanmasını kesinlikle reddediyorum. Lütfen kendinize başka bir kurban bulun."
